description_long: This object is a short sword or large knife with a broad, slightly curved single-edged blade made of dark gray metal. The blade has a pronounced belly and a gently sloping spine, with a subtle wavy pattern along the cutting edge. The handle is straight and appears to be made of wood, featuring a large circular metal ring at the pommel end and a smaller ring near the guard. Several leather tassels or straps hang from the pommel ring, adding a decorative touch. The guard is minimal, consisting of a simple metal disc separating the blade from the handle. The overall design suggests a utilitarian yet slightly ornate weapon, possibly inspired by historical or fantasy styles.
description: A broad, curved single-edged sword with a wooden handle, metal rings, and leather tassels, featuring a simple disc guard.
description_view_0: The left side of the sword shows the full blade profile, wooden handle, large pommel ring, and hanging leather tassels.
description_view_1: The sword is viewed edge-on, showing the thinness of the blade and the circular cross-section of the handle and rings.
description_view_2: The right side displays the blade's curve, the wooden handle, and the rings, with tassels visible at the pommel.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side, highlighting the blade's thickness and the alignment of the handle and rings.
attribute_handle_design: straight wooden handle with large metal pommel ring and leather tassels
